rationale: Educ. Code §21.452 governs developmental leaves of absence for school district employees. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may grant a developmental leave of absence for study, research, travel, or another suitable purpose to an employee who:
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this educator leave provision.
